DB.description: Cloudflare D1 database used as the source of truth for memos, users, relations, shares, settings, and attachment metadata.

ATTACHMENTS.description: Cloudflare R2 bucket used for attachment binaries, export bundles, and other object files.

FLAREMO_SINGLE_USER_EMAIL.description: Owner email used by the single-user runtime model.

FLAREMO_SINGLE_USER_NAME.description: Owner display name used by the single-user runtime model.
